programme.title: Suhaag
programme.desc: Best friends Ajay and Raj are goofy college-going boys, who love playing pranks on others. Ajay's life turns upside down after he finds out about a tragic incident related to his estranged father, which might put his friendship with Raj at stake.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: The movie follows an insomniac office worker who befriends a charismatic soap salesman, and together they start an underground fight club as a way to cope with their mundane lives. As the club gains popularity, they become involved in a larger plan to undermine the consumerist society they live in.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: It tells the story of Raj and Pooja, a couple married for 40 years, who are forced to live apart after retirement when their four sons refuse to care for them together.

programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.title: Hello Hum Lallan Bol Rahe Hain
programme.desc: Lallan, a security guard, loves Saroja, who is supposed to get married to an older man for money. However, while convincing her to change her mind, he finds out another shocking fact about her.

programme.title: Call For Fun
programme.desc: Call For Fun is an edgy, coming of age laughathon revolving around the escapades of a young boy who takes over the reins of his father's business and faces a vortex of misadventures - mafia threats to client losses.

programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: The movie follows an insomniac office worker who befriends a charismatic soap salesman, and together they start an underground fight club as a way to cope with their mundane lives. As the club gains popularity, they become involved in a larger plan to undermine the consumerist society they live in.

programme.title: Baghban
programme.desc: It tells the story of Raj and Pooja, a couple married for 40 years, who are forced to live apart after retirement when their four sons refuse to care for them together.

programme.title: Khuda Kasam The Challenge
programme.desc: CBI officer Neetu Singh is framed for the assassination of a chief minister. She attempts to solve this murder mystery with the help of a man who is sentenced to prison for a crime he never committed.

programme.title: Gumnaam The Mystery
programme.desc: An aspiring actress, Ria who models and acts in music videos is offered a lead role in a film by casting director Rishi Gandhi. However, when she arrives at the director's mansion, she begins to realise that things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey (the Rising)
programme.desc: It is the year 1857. The British are plundering the resources of their Indian subjects, who have reached their breaking point. Soldier Mangal Pandey (Aamir Khan) leads an uprising against India's imperialist occupiers -- events the British call a mutiny and the Indians call a war for independence. Throughout the violent events, Mangal maintains a friendship with Capt. William Gordon (Toby Stephens), who sympathizes with India's subjugated citizens and obeys his conscience.

programme.title: Himalay Ki Godmein
programme.desc: A newly qualified young doctor chooses to practise medicine in a small and remote Himalayan village which previously had no doctor or any medical facilities. His fiancée accompanies him but is appalled by the conditions and so leaves, forcing him to make a decision between staying to support the local people, or relocating to be with his love.

programme.title: Bad Aur Badnaam
programme.desc: Story begins with three villains getting a lot of money and new identities from rich man Pedro getting killed in return. Later two secret agents - James (Sanjeev Kumar) from Ringania and Ashwinikumar (Shatrughan Sinha) from Indian intelligence Bureau are shown at the top of their game. Due to some misconception, they brcome sworn enemies but meanwhile they have their jobs to do. Ashwinikumar is investigating a mysteriousplot to kill a VVIP in Delhi while James is no a Ringanian mission in india. They fight and temporarity make Peace and the rest of the movie is about their joint effort to figure out the mystery and ruin the evil plot.

programme.title: Zulm O Sitam
programme.desc: Superintendent of Police, Arun, has been assigned to lead the detail in charge of the state's Chief Minister's protection. However, things do not go as planned and the Chief Minister is killed.

programme.title: Suhana Safar
programme.desc: Enticed by his poetry, Sapna travels to India from the USA to meet poet Ujjwala. She meets a man, Sunil, who falls for her but decides to help her reach him in Phulwari.

programme.title: Lohe Ke Haath
programme.desc: Gayatri's mother-in-law Bindu Devi tries to set fire to her on her wedding night for her dowry; her husband Jainath is equally responsible for this attempt. Gayatri is saved by Triloki, but he doesn't have good intentions: he rapes her. Gayatri saves another woman from getting molested and both meet Maataji, who is also a victim of dowry. Maataji trains helpless women to fight against injustice and Gayatri turns into a rebel.

programme.title: Zulm O Sitam
programme.desc: Superintendent of Police, Arun, has been assigned to lead the detail in charge of the state's Chief Minister's protection. However, things do not go as planned and the Chief Minister is killed.

programme.title: Suhana Safar
programme.desc: Enticed by his poetry, Sapna travels to India from the USA to meet poet Ujjwala. She meets a man, Sunil, who falls for her but decides to help her reach him in Phulwari.

programme.title: Bad Aur Badnaam
programme.desc: Story begins with three villains getting a lot of money and new identities from rich man Pedro getting killed in return. Later two secret agents - James (Sanjeev Kumar) from Ringania and Ashwinikumar (Shatrughan Sinha) from Indian intelligence Bureau are shown at the top of their game. Due to some misconception, they brcome sworn enemies but meanwhile they have their jobs to do. Ashwinikumar is investigating a mysteriousplot to kill a VVIP in Delhi while James is no a Ringanian mission in india. They fight and temporarity make Peace and the rest of the movie is about their joint effort to figure out the mystery and ruin the evil plot.

programme.title: Abhimanyu
programme.desc: Panni wreaks havoc in the lives of Manu and Tulsi, forcing them to leave the village. Years later, they return to exact a not-so-sweet revenge upon Panni.

programme.title: Kangan
programme.desc: Sunil lives a middle-classed lifestyle in a village in India along with his widowed mom, Janki. He is studying Medicine in the city, is in love with his childhood sweetheart, Shanta, and everyone expects them to get married soon. However, Janki does not approve of Shanta, finds her uncouth and illiterate, and instead approves of Shobha and arranges Sunil's marriage with her.

programme.title: Ustadon Ke Ustad
programme.desc: Vishwanath and Jaikishan are two thieves and good friends. When they try to lead an honest life for the sake of their women, Pukhraj turns them against each other and the two become sworn enemies.

programme.title: Best Of 90s – Filmy Beats Reloaded
programme.desc: Take a ride through the vibrant 90s with peppy love anthems, dramatic duets, and emotional melodies. This jukebox celebrates the signature style of Bollywood's musical revival decade.

programme.title: Rajesh Khanna – The Superstar's Anthems
programme.desc: Revisit the unmatched charm of Rajesh Khanna with this jukebox of unforgettable melodies. Romantic, philosophical, and heartfelt – these songs defined an era and a superstar.

programme.title: Jeetendra Hits The Jumping Jack
programme.desc: Dive into Jeetendra’s iconic hits—The Jumping Jack’s timeless energy! Relive the magic of Bollywood’s golden era with foot-tapping beats, romance, and pure nostalgia!

programme.title: Neetu Singh Evergreen Hits
programme.desc: Turn up the retro vibes with Neetu Singh’s greatest hits! A birthday playlist packed with nostalgia, romance, and endless charm.

programme.title: Superhits Of 90s
programme.desc: Relive the '90s with Superhits! Romantic melodies, peppy beats, and timeless nostalgia—dance, sing along, and fall in love all over again!

programme.title: Dharmendra He Man Of Bollywood
programme.desc: Time-travel through Dharmendra's iconic hits – the ultimate He-Man of Bollywood! Timeless romance, unforgettable melodies that define an era of pure masala magic!

programme.title: Alka Yagnik Superhit Singer
programme.desc: Press play on nostalgia! Alka Yagnik's velvet voice brings back memories with these evergreen hits that still give us goosebumps today.

programme.title: Dimple Kapadia & Neetu Singh
programme.desc: Dance through the disco era with Dimple & Neetu! Playful whispers, foot-tapping romance, and melodies that defined a generation’s dreams.

programme.title: Mithun Chakraborty
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with Mithun Da's greatest hits! From 'Disco Dancer' to romantic ballads, this collection is pure Bollywood retro gold.

programme.title: Best Of B R Chopra
programme.desc: Dive into these timeless tracks that shaped Hindi cinema's musical heritage. The golden touch of B.R. Chopra - where every song became legendary.

programme.title: Hema Malini Parveen Babi Hit Bollywood Divas
programme.desc: The Original Bollywood Divas! Hema's elegance + Parveen's sass = Unbeatable 70s magic. Press play for nostalgia in every note!

programme.title: Dance Hits
programme.desc: Pure nostalgia on the dance floor! Celebrate the vibrant sounds of old-school Hindi dance music with timeless beats and retro charm.

programme.title: Shahenshah Of Bollywood-83rd Birthday Special Vol 2
programme.desc: Iconic melodies of Amitabh Bachchan reflecting romance,pride, and cinematic brilliance.

programme.title: Aplam Chaplam
programme.desc: Jayantika Sengupta: Rani Rahaao: Villain Zoya Sheikh: Child Sundeep Kumar: Son Vikar Tiwari: Friend of a son Sikandar Agarwal: Transgender

programme.title: Alvida
programme.desc: Break-ups can be hard, but sometimes they are necessary. Sometimes, you need all your strength to let go and say ... Alvida.

programme.title: Arundeep Singh
programme.desc: A man with a speech disorder who even struggles to do his day to day activities will face his greatest fear of dating a woman.

programme.title: Ban Chor
programme.desc: A thief sneaks into a wealthy home for an easy heist—only to find the wife’s secret lover already there! But when the husband arrives, the thief and the lover must hide together, leading to a night of pure chaos, panic, and comedy. Because in this house… "Har chor pe ek mor hota hai!"

programme.title: Avasthana
programme.desc: A Hindi short film revolving around the sad plight of a family who is struggling hard to cope up with everyday expenses. The situation gets so worst that the youngest son robs a chicken from a shop and gets it to the house in spite of them being vegetarians. Watch an emotional journey of this family after the death of patriarchy

programme.title: Ansh
programme.desc: When Nidhi visits an orphanage with hopes of adopting, she is confronted by the unresolved trauma of losing her own child to kidnapping. As she battles grief and depression, she must find a way to heal and embrace life again. A poignant tale of loss, resilience, and the power of hope.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: Annie, who had recently experienced the loss of her unborn child, crosses paths with an enigmatic homeless man one evening. Unbeknownst to her, that meeting was on the brink of altering her life permanently.

programme.title: Live A Little
programme.desc: It starts with an after-party sequence. It is late at night. Nimisha, 26, struggles to get a ride back home when Atish, 46, sees this and offers her help. She refuses at first but eventually agrees. The journey gives Nimisha a peek into her boss's life. As they reach Nimisha’s destination they are ready to move on in their lives, but the night has more to offer them. Due to a sudden turn of events, they end up under one roof and despite their differences, they help each other get a new perspective

programme.title: A Situation
programme.desc: A widower father, Pradeep has adapted to the challenging life of raising a daughter single-handedly after demise of his wife. One fine morning, she undergoes menstrual bleeding while taking a bath. Helpless and terrified she is locked inside the bathroom, not answering her father. He does not understand what to do next. This film shows that even today, periods stand as the biggest question to a lot of parents.

programme.title: Aflatoon
programme.desc: A narrative unfolding the tale of two brothers residing far from their home, eager to dispatch a sweet treat to their unwell father.

programme.title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch Chapter 2
programme.desc: One year after the mysterious events of part 1, a newly married couple comes across a lady who claims to be Mangla. They are warned about the 150-year-old Witch that wanders around at night asking for an Onion. Things go haywire when a small girl knocks for help at midnight.

programme.title: Agarbatti
programme.desc: Bhola, who is mentally challenged but still manages to survive by himself, selling incense sticks on the roads. An accident takes place near bhola, he doesn’t see the person clearly who is driving the car. Will he be able to tell the police about this incident?

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: The film is about Sara’s journey as she goes about understanding her role in the greater scheme of things. Sara - who has lost her twin sister to a mysterious vanishing - is trying to come to grips with her loss.

programme.title: Family
programme.desc: Anvith's friend Karthik is leaving school and moving to another city as his parents are getting divorced. This news makes Anvith very sad. The reason for their divorce which Karthik reveals to Anvith is a regular heated argument between Karthik's parents. Then Anvith also starts noticing the same argument between his parents. So, Anvith decides to do everything right so that their parents don't fight, but end up ruining everything which leads to a more heated argument.

programme.title: Baalak
programme.desc: A film about a girl moving to Kolkata for her new job. She chooses a hotel for overnight stay where an incident makes her realize that life revolves in a circle and carries her emotionally very close to her home and family.

programme.title: Antahakaran
programme.desc: As a devout Hindu seeks vengeance, his two associates with conflicting ideologies attempt to manipulate him.

programme.title: Ahsaas
programme.desc: Ahsaas is the emotional journey of Sana, a devoted wife caught in society’s definition of a “complete woman.” As childlessness becomes a burden, her husband’s support becomes her strength—leading them to seek help and reclaim their peace, together.

programme.title: Barat
programme.desc: A Typical miser starts picking up a mysterious trail of money only to find out something unearthly lurking around!

programme.title: Bahar Aa Chaman Prakash
programme.desc: Bahar Aa Chaman Prakash" delves into the story of a man reluctant to marry his lifelong acquaintance. Shutting himself away and avoiding his father, he faces the girl his father wishes him to wed. When she joins him and locks themselves in a room, they emerge with a revelation connected to the man's inner struggles. Will his father embrace this truth?

programme.title: Adhure Poore Se Hum
programme.desc: Two college time friends embark on a long drive on a Sunday morning, leaving their bustling city lives behind. As they amble through the hilly roads, they reveal to each other, their old longings and hidden pasts. Their rose tinted nostalgia is broken and they come face to face with their imperfect lives.

programme.title: 10.30 Lets Go To School
programme.desc: Disha is an ordinary village girl with dreams like any other kid. Not only does she love her father unconditionally, but also her books and school. Life takes an unexpected turn when her Baba and Bua decide to discontinue their education. Her fate is about to meet that of thousands of other children who drop out of school every year. However, it is not so easy to give up. She is intelligent, confident and above all, determined to get back what she rightfully deserves, her right to dream!

programme.title: Anu Aur Di
programme.desc: Late at night, an angry girl had a fight with her boyfriend and called her sister. She had a big suitcase when her sister picked her up in the car. During the drive, they argued and brought up old problems. Things got worse, and the older sister pushed the younger one against the car window in anger. Their argument stopped suddenly when police lights flashed in the dark, and officers pulled them over. The air was tense with anticipation. What would come to light during this unexpected encounter with the police?

programme.title: Aakhri Sawari
programme.desc: Manish, a perfect husband and father, tormented by a mysterious parcel he receives from an anonymous sender has to make a life-changing decision. He shares his problems with his cab driver who listens patiently and tries to help. What the cab driver offers changes both of their lives forever.

programme.title: ABC
programme.desc: For some people life is about triumph against all odds, for some; life is only about complexities. Some walk through this road aimlessly and some; actually become the bridge. ABC is a short film that showcases the dichotomy between two extreme yet simple individuals. It is an empowering film which has the dexterity & optimism to resonate amongst all sections of audience. As humans, we do tend to forget that we are but one world than just mere economy, that it can just take one human, just one moment, just one action to turn around the paths of millions. ABC; is just a sweet gentle reminder of this thought.

programme.title: Aakhri Kahani
programme.desc: A struggling writer decides that he's going to make one last effort to pitch his idea to a film producer. He gets the chance to do so in an unusual way when he turns out to be driving a cab that the producer has hired.

programme.title: Adarniya Mantri Ji
programme.desc: In a gripping tale, Finance Minister Supriya Chaudhry leads a crackdown on black money with her secretary, Laxman. After seizing 1200 crores, they discover 600 crores are missing. Laxman uncovers a secret plan, revealing himself as the masked figure holding the bank manager hostage. As chaos ensues and the truth unfolds, Laxman informs Supriya of their covert success, leaving viewers with a tense cliff hanger. The story ends with the title Adarniya Mantri Ji, leaving the mystery unresolved.

programme.title: Abba Ki Chaddi
programme.desc: in Small town where she lives.. Whose husband used to bother her a lot and was responsible for everything, One day suddenly her husband starts fearing her in the name of his father's stick.she does not like his words,makes

programme.title: Aam Ka Achaar
programme.desc: Haunted by the riots that took his parents 20 years ago, Karan confronts the man who once loved him as a son—yet betrayed him in the worst way. Torn between revenge and forgiveness, he seeks meaning in the madness. A powerful story of loss, betrayal, and the fight for redemption.

programme.title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch
programme.desc: Two flatmates, evidently from the gym-going North Indian breed of tinsel-town hopefuls, are warned about the 100 year old Witch that occasionally wanders around at night asking for an Onion. When an attractive neighbour knocks for help at midnight, their red-blooded fates unravel.

programme.title: Ae Ajnabi
programme.desc: Pappu, a misunderstood dreamer, carries a ring for the unknown—waiting for love, waiting for meaning. On a fateful night, he meets Chandini, a mysterious stranger who changes his world in just five hours. As they share stories, laughter, and heartbreak, Pappu finds answers he never knew he needed. But was she ever real? Or just a gift from the sun? A poetic journey of love, loss, and destiny.

programme.title: A Notice
programme.desc: Notice is a Hindi short film about a couple and the distance which gets created due a loss, it is about the unsaid things in a relationships.

programme.title: Akhiri Parchi
programme.desc: This movie serves as an inspirational tool for kids, helping them grasp the extent of their parents' sacrifices and efforts to ensure their lives are comfortable and fulfilling, despite challenging circumstances. It aims to convey a powerful message, encouraging children to maximize their available resources and strive for their best.

programme.title: 2 Square
programme.desc: Nikhil comes early after work, and his wife runs to the bedroom where a man is hiding under the bed. She tries to indulge in small talks with Nikhil only to distract him so that her boyfriend can run away. What happens at the end is hilarious.

programme.title: 23 B Raheja
programme.desc: 23B Raheja is a gripping one-night drama that peels back the glossy layers of the entertainment industry to expose the shadows lurking beneath. The story revolves around a celebrated casting director whose charm masks a long trail of manipulation and exploitation. His power begins to crumble when a young woman arrives at his door, posing as an aspiring actress—but with a haunting connection to his past. As the night unfolds, so does a tense game of revelations, where truth becomes confrontation and justice takes an unexpected form. Taut, timely, and unsettlingly real, 23B Raheja is not just a story of reckoning—it’s a mirror held up to the systems we too often ignore.

programme.title: Nathania
programme.desc: One evening a couple, Kishan and Aparna reach home to witness what they have feared the most. This compels them to take the most critical decision of their life. Will they be able to live with the practical decision they make?

programme.title: Love Ishtory
programme.desc: Chhavi belongs to a Brahmin family. She loves Aakash who is from a backward caste. Chhavi’s father is very disappointed with her daughter’s decision. Her father orders local inspector Dubey to catch Aakash to rough him up. But Chhavi’s elder brother Vicky appears in between. Vicky’s intention seems as he will blow Aakash’s head off. But there is a twist in the tale.

programme.title: Meera
programme.desc: In this heartfelt story, a mother calls out to her daughter, only to be scolded by her husband. Her daughter, Meera, is a special child who cannot speak or hear, yet her mother sends her to school with hope. Despite the chaos and negativity around her, Meera remains blissfully unaware, finding beauty and positivity in everything. Her innocence and zest for life serve as a touching reminder of the purity within, even in a world filled with harsh words.

programme.title: Khayaal Rakhna
programme.desc: A senior woman grapples with dementia, compelling her husband to confront challenging choices.

programme.title: Hausla
programme.desc: Danish, a village boy with kabaddi dreams, faces adversity as he's unfairly removed from his team due to a dispute he didn't start. Despite family discord, his father stands by him. A new opportunity arises, showcasing Danish's talent. He's selected for the biggest game of his life, but tragedy strikes: his father passes away. Will Danish find the strength to play on, honoring his father's memory?

programme.title: Last Call
programme.desc: When the last conversation between two lovers whose 6-year relationship is on the verge of ending, an attempt has been made to show that words are less and emotions are more.

programme.title: L'idiot
programme.desc: L’Idiot tells the story of Rinku, a young, eccentric man who is captivated by French culture and hopelessly infatuated with Mona, a charismatic and free-spirited girl in his language class. His romantic fantasies and attempts to impress Mona take a comedic yet dark twist when he encounters a mysterious “thief,” who manipulates Rinku into a dubious scheme to win Mona’s affection. Rinku’s innocent longing for friendship and love leads him into an awkward and ultimately dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: Killer By Chance
programme.desc: The story follows an introverted person who works in an office and has a small circle of friends. He becomes enamored with his female boss, and upon returning home, receives a message from a massage company offering to send a beautiful girl to his place. Initially refusing the offer, he eventually accepts and prepares for her arrival. After a night of partying and sleeping over, a tragic event occurs, revealing the true nature of the introverted man.

programme.title: Naam Badal Dena
programme.desc: A couple who is head over heels in love with each other with a love that's extraordinary yet relatable. The wife is told by everyone that she is too trusting of her husband. The wife makes a pact with her husband that if she ever acts like an ordinary suspecting wife he can change her name. The universe then puts her to the test on their wedding anniversary. The husband then makes her admit her true feelings as a wife and believe that possessiveness and jealousy in moderation are good.

programme.title: Manita
programme.desc: In a tale of wealth and solitude, two orphaned brothers lead opulent yet lonely lives, marked by the younger sibling's constant neglect by the elder.

programme.title: Laxmi
programme.desc: Laxmi works as a maid at the house of a couple. She reaches home early only to find the owners of the house dead. She panics and tells her boyfriend about this. He thinks of a plan and tells her to rob the jewelry and cash from the house. Will she be able to do it? or is she falling for a trap?

programme.title: Late Lateef
programme.desc: Amir, who is in his mid-20s, is struggling with self-doubt and feeling trapped in his work routine. Unfortunately, his habit of being consistently late has caused him to fall out of favor with many people, including himself. This has created a vicious cycle that he has been unable to break free from despite his best efforts. However, having a supportive inner voice has been a great blessing for him as he tries to push through his struggles.

programme.title: Ludo
programme.desc: Two girls accidentally find out that in addition to the man they unknowingly share, they also share a lot of gifts from him. Including a game of Ludo which resembles their lives in some manner.

programme.title: Mere Shohar Ki Begam
programme.desc: Javed already married but still he wants second marriage. His first wife Rukhsar opposed him, he beats her and second day he gets his second wife Afsana at home. Because of jealousy, bitterness revenge game starts between both wives.

programme.title: Jevlas Ka
programme.desc: A gym freak eagerly awaits his cheat day, but family drama and an empty wallet stand in his way. As he navigates the chaos of Mumbai, will he find a way to satisfy his cravings, or will the city serve up an even bigger surprise? A fun-filled ride of food, family, and unexpected twists!

programme.title: Mestri
programme.desc: The man is displaying the behaviour of a thug. He receives calls similar to those of Abbas Khan. Along his journey, he follows a couple in their mid-twenties. Initially, they appear in Christian attire, then in Gujarati attire. Later, they appear in Muslim attire. one day the thug catches both of them. And he confronts them in front of Abbas Khan. At that time, there was a confrontation between the thug and Abbas Khan regarding money. At that time, the real story was revealed.

programme.title: Dimming Shadows
programme.desc: The husband and wife both suffer from dementia, but with the help of a compassionate doctor and nurse, they make an effort to recover. Unfortunately, their attempts are unsuccessful, but their daughter finds solace in visualizing her parents as alive through virtual reality

programme.title: Kshan
programme.desc: After a dinner-time discussion about mental health turns sour, Kamlesh (55) riles his daughter, Disha, a clinical psychologist, into storming off from the gathering. This incites Kamlesh into visiting three doors to his past that make him realise that he himself suffers from a mental health disorder. 'Kshan' is a recollection of a broken man's traumatic events and his realisation that drives him to seek help from his daughter after learning to let go of his ego.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Love has many things hidden instore. What happens and Why does it happen? The secrets will be revealed in Kidnapped

programme.title: Meri Ramma Sabse Special
programme.desc: After a 15-year absence, Vikrant comes back home, only to be unexpectedly entangled in a web of unresolved issues and unspoken tensions with his mother. Confronting painful truths and reopening old wounds, he embarks on a quest for answers that could mend the fractured bonds between them. In this emotionally charged narrative, Vikrant must face his past to forge a brighter future and repair the ties strained by time.

programme.title: Leaf
programme.desc: Raj and Neha, a newly married couple, move into a new house and soon begin sensing an eerie presence. Over time, they discover that the house is connected to their past lives, where they were caught in a karmic cycle of falling in love.

programme.title: It's A Match!
programme.desc: Saurabh gets a match on a dating app and enlists his friend Shobhit’s help. But when Shobhit steals the spotlight—and the girl—things take a hilarious turn. Lies unravel, friendships are tested, and just when you think it's over… another match changes everything! A fun-filled tale of love, loyalty, and second chances

programme.title: Mentoo
programme.desc: A director is accused by an upcoming actress of harassing her and asking her to sleep with him and he would cast her in his next film, these allegations literally destroy his career, but are all allegations always true?

programme.title: Love, Bites
programme.desc: Love, bites is a romantic drama where the story revolves around the lives of Karthik, an artist, and Meghna, scientist. Their sexual chemistry is obvious to everyone. Even to those who haven’t seen them together, since they like to flaunt the hickeys on their body. But something changes in their equation when the hickey becomes a bridge of memory that leads to an old sexual encounter Meghna had which Karthik finds out about. Will Meghna be able to help Karthik erase the marks of her past? Or will Karthik just to have to wake up to a realization that the past, even though it haunts, might not be real.

programme.title: Khalish
programme.desc: Everyday violence in the household plagues the childhood of a girl. The helplessness and anxiety that arises from such an experience builds in her as she grows up. Her aversion to authority manifests itself in extreme outcomes later.

programme.title: Laugh
programme.desc: A film about who we were and who we've become , how socialising was and where its reached ,how something as simple as laughing has taken a complicated turn

programme.title: Laali (bahaar Part 02)
programme.desc: Bahaar is a haunting tale of a young bride crushed under the weight of infertility and expectations. Once cherished, she’s slowly erased—until the family finds a “solution.” A heart breaking reflection on womanhood, shame, and broken promises.

programme.title: Lock-Up
programme.desc: Inspector Maya Verma Has Just Arrested A Young Girl From The Red Light District. Kanchan Is Defiant And Unaffected, At First. A Conversation Between Them Leads To An Interesting Revelation. A Twisted Night With A Twisted End.

programme.title: Mingi
programme.desc: In Malaysia, Mingi and Elisa, a couple, face a challenging twist in their lives. Mingi, born blind and grappling with amnesia, travels to India for a brief visit. Tragically, during his absence, Elisa dies. The narrative introduces a doctor who believes the killer is a figment of Mingi's imagination, adding a psychological dimension to the story

programme.title: Life 2.0
programme.desc: Life 2.0 is the reflection of modern life, where Humans have become like God. GOD means generator, operator & destroyer but look at us, what are we doing; we are also doing the same.

programme.title: Late Night Taxi
programme.desc: All the fears of a girl come to life after she travels in a late-night taxi she had booked. Does she reach home safely?

programme.title: Nazariyaa
programme.desc: Mihika, a 22 year old, fights with her dad yet again over going out late at night. She finds it very unreasonable of him to be so worried now that she’s 22. Waiting for her cab, she overhears her building’s supervisor talking on a phone call with his own daughter. She steps in and debates with him about how he shouldn’t be upset about her being out late at night but understands his perspective too in the process. She then goes back home to apologise and reconcile with her dad. The supervisor also understands his daughter’s situation better through this chance encounter.

programme.title: Khwahishon Ki Car
programme.desc: A newlywed longs to drive her dowry car, but is stalled by her husband's ego and her mother-in-law’s control. The Driver’s Seat is a quiet rebellion about agency, freedom, and the fight to take control—on the road and in life.

programme.title: Meri Bebbe
programme.desc: Based on true events, this poignant tale follows a young boy navigating life after losing his father and the unwavering efforts of his single mother to raise him against all odds.

programme.title: Marz
programme.desc: Rajeev is afflicted by an unusual illness, confounding even his doctor, who's encountering such a case for the first time. Is it a supernatural phenomenon or something within the confines of their home? Unravel the mystery in this quirky 14-minute narrative.

programme.title: Kissss
programme.desc: Joy and Ichcha elope from their respective houses as their parents are against them getting married. They take shelter at Joy's friend, Mihir's place. Mihir, who meets Ichcha for the first time is enchanted with her beauty. He is wondering why the families are against such a wonderful pair. Watch to find out the secret behind.

programme.title: Kundli
programme.desc: Kundli - is a film about values in life, which change some decisions against the will of the characters. It's about two meetings of these characters in a different time period and shows the changes that have occurred in their lives. Though along with time things have changed but there are something’s which are unforgettable at the back of the mind. Kundli is a film about small things that have remained though the times have changed.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: Payal and Nikhil have been married for 14 years, have lived happily and celebrated all the important occasions together. But now, sitting at the breakfast table, Nikhil breaks his silence, tells Payal that he does not want to drag this relation any further since there is no love left in their relationship. He confesses that he is in love with his colleague and they should get a divorce. Payal tells him that she will give him divorce but she has conditions which need to be fulfilled. Will Nikhil agree to it? What is the condition? Watch this awesome romantic short film to find out.

programme.title: My Mothers Last Birthday Gift
programme.desc: Confronting terminal lung cancer, a resolute mother sets out on a heartfelt journey to prepare her bright 7-year-old son with the emotional strength to cope with her impending absence, treasuring their remaining time together.

programme.title: It's A Match!
programme.desc: Saurabh gets a match on a dating app and enlists his friend Shobhit’s help. But when Shobhit steals the spotlight—and the girl—things take a hilarious turn. Lies unravel, friendships are tested, and just when you think it's over… another match changes everything! A fun-filled tale of love, loyalty, and second chances

programme.title: Jevlas Ka
programme.desc: A gym freak eagerly awaits his cheat day, but family drama and an empty wallet stand in his way. As he navigates the chaos of Mumbai, will he find a way to satisfy his cravings, or will the city serve up an even bigger surprise? A fun-filled ride of food, family, and unexpected twists!

programme.title: Khayaal Rakhna
programme.desc: A senior woman grapples with dementia, compelling her husband to confront challenging choices.

programme.title: Late Night Taxi
programme.desc: All the fears of a girl come to life after she travels in a late-night taxi she had booked. Does she reach home safely?

programme.desc: After a dinner-time discussion about mental health turns sour, Kamlesh (55) riles his daughter, Disha, a clinical psychologist, into storming off from the gathering. This incites Kamlesh into visiting three doors to his past that make him realise that he himself suffers from a mental health disorder. 'Kshan' is a recollection of a broken man's traumatic events and his realisation that drives him to seek help from his daughter after learning to let go of his ego.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Spytime
programme.desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Wrecker
programme.desc: Two beautiful young women taking a trip through the countryside, are terrorized by an unknown driver trying to run them down in a heavy duty tow truck.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: John awakens from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were murdered in a brutal home invasion. Haunted by images of the attack, he vows to kill the man responsible: The fight pits John against Andrew Scott and an army of genetically enhanced warriors; meanwhile, he must contend with a Uni Sol in relentless pursuit.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge

programme.title: Untraceable

The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. programme.title: Room 203
programme.desc: Many residents of ROOM 203 have disappeared since the murder suicide of a married couple exactly fifty years ago. Lifelong friends Kim and Izzy and roommates are terrified by the vengeful spirits dwelling in their apartment. To save Izzy's life, Kim may need to sacrifice her own. Based on the Internationally Bestselling novel by Kamon Nanami.

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: You can’t escape them. They’re everywhere. They bring tears to our eyes. They make us laugh. They bring us pain. Gordon a visionary inventor of the Rememory machine that allows him to see memories. He dies in his office. Is it murder? Sam investigates by using the machine "borrowed" from Gordon's wife. He looks at memories of others involved. REMEMORY is a noir mystery Thriller.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Based on the international best-selling novel The Room. Corner Office an absurdist tale of a man lost in his own space. Our corporate hero is trying to move up in his newly acquired job and discovers a secret room in his office building; his alienation deepens when he discovers a room he's told doesn't exist. Discover human behavior to find humor in the absurdity of everyday life.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: American Boogeyman
programme.desc: This is the true story behind the manhunt that brought America’s most fearsome boogeyman to justice. His name is Ted Bundy. A specter roams the highways of the gritty 1970s America hunting for his next prey. Tracking him are intrepid FBI female agent Kathleen & Robert Ressler organizers of the largest manhunt in history to apprehend America’s most Notorious infamous serial killer.

programme.title: Maneater
programme.desc: While the group of friends explore a beautiful small island, all hell breaks loose for Jessie as the rogue shark sets its hunting grounds within the vicinity. A Father with a score to settle brings his war to their doorstep.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: Jurassic Hunt
programme.desc: In this pulse-pounding Creature thriller, Female adventurer Parker joins a crew of male trophy hunters in a remote wilderness park. Their goal: slaughter genetically recreated dinosaurs & must work together to evade the giant human-hungry creatures and mercenaries hired to finish them off. This battle's about to become primitive.

programme.title: Redline

programme.title: The Good Boss
programme.desc: What makes a Good Boss? Is your boss good? Manipulative? Shamelessly meddles in his employees private lives? Crosses every line imaginable. The Good Boss is a biting character study with academy award winner Javier Bardem. To win the competition, the manipulative "good boss" unknowingly starts an explosive chain reaction with wild consequences.

programme.title: Death Of Me
programme.desc: A vacationing couple on an island off the coast of Thailand with no memory of the previous night must discover the mystery behind a strange video that shows one of them killing the other. In a web of mystery, black magic, and murder they must attempt to reconstruct the night's events & discover is she to blame for not being sacrificed or was it Mother Nature?

programme.title: Untraceable

The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

programme.title: Redline

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: King Lear
programme.desc: King Lear poses the question: What does it mean to be human? Its subtitle could be Being Human. Cruelty, barbarity, savagery, kindness, tenderness, love, in a world that gives not very much back. Set in the fictional present, an aging King invites disaster when he abdicates to his corrupt, toadying daughters, and rejects his loving and honest one.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: A group of soldiers attempting to rescue a hostage from a terrorist crash land into unfamiliar jungles which are inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Now they must find a way out of this isolated valley before becoming prey for prehistoric predators.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: This timeless tale was originally written in 1757. Could Beauty ever love the ghastly lord, the Beast? The year is 1810. After losing his fortune at sea, a bankrupt merchant poor father-of-six, after plucking a scented rose from the repulsive master's garden must do the impossible, permit his daughter Beauty, to take his place and pay for the parent’s sins. Only true love can break the spell.

programme.title: Riders Of Justice
programme.desc: Markus goes home to his teenage daughter, Mathilde, when his wife dies in a train crash. All appears to be a tragic accident until a mathematics geek, who was also a fellow passenger on the train, and his two colleagues show up.

programme.title: Rememory

He looks at memories of others involved. REMEMORY is a noir mystery Thriller.
